subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Qiblih of all horizons, that the verses of his Lord may draw him and bring him nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی قبله الافاق لتجذبه آیات ربه و تقربه الی
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @high station of the true believer, @belief and denial, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
